title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 55.
content:
There was an old Man of Bohemia,
    Whose daughter was christened Euphemia;
    Till one day, to his grief,
    She married a thief,
    Which grieved that old Man of Bohemia.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 55."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
